title: Anatomy of a Ricardian Contract on the Blockchain
description: A flowchart illustrating how a Ricardian contract bridges legal intent and blockchain execution, connecting human-readable terms with machine-executable code.
relationships: Parties draft and sign the Legal Document
Document is hashed to create a unique identifier
Hash is embedded into the Smart Contract's code
Smart Contract is deployed to the Blockchain
Execution of code on the ledger is linked to the legal terms via the hash
